interface: S3 REST API 2006-03-01 multipart operations via AWS SDK for Python (boto3) 1.43.50

complete_multipart_upload.parts_order: ascending by PartNumber; an out-of-order list fails with InvalidPartOrder
complete_multipart_upload.multipart_etag_note: the ETag of a completed multipart object is not an MD5 of the whole object; it ends in -<part count>

abort_multipart_upload.success: HTTP 204; frees stored parts so they stop accruing storage charges

retry_policy.sdk_note: the harness builds the boto3 client with retries total_max_attempts=1 so the SDK performs no internal retries; the uploader owns the retry policy
